title: More Shields
description: Boring in old shield? Then this mod is for you, this mod gives you 6 new overpowered shieldvariation.
body:
![Craftingrecipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59c14240231f34fdf7acf6a01b912fc38ba9e59e.png)![Craftingrecipe2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07abbeba6f65f5c39c2659df6f1ddef337bfb20c.png)![Craftingrecipe3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/855097704e69299b9a146d39e61dc3eb025b1509.png)![Craftingrecipe4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d706b6ea9634b5dd6dad0f53f7fff65a362545d.png)![CraftingRecipe5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ecb6c09210970940aed071766a8b8562f78f7d6a.png)![CraftingRecipe6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e046c62f301372bb2aafe92e8c479db36146780.png)⚔️ Shield Expansion Mod – Description

This mod adds six unique, powerful shields, each designed to give blocking a whole new meaning. Every shield comes with its own special effect that triggers when you successfully block an attack. Choose your shield wisely and turn defense into a deadly weapon!

🔥 Fire Shield

Unleash burning retaliation.
When you block with the Fire Shield, your attacker is instantly set on fire, punishing anyone who dares to strike you.

💨 Wind Shield

Send enemies flying.
Blocking launches your attacker high into the air, giving you space, safety, and a good laugh.

❄️ Ice Shield

Freeze your foes in place.
Upon blocking, there's a 50% chance to trap your enemy in 6 powdered snow blocks, immobilizing them like an icy prison.

💎 Amethyst Shield

A last-resort, high-risk, high-reward tool.
This shield has only 1 use, but when you block with it, it instantly kills the attacker. Extremely powerful—and extremely expensive to craft.

🟣 Ender Shield

A durable guardian with mystical energy.
Boasting very high durability, the Ender Shield applies 5 seconds of Glowing to your attacker when you block, making them easy to track even through walls.

⚡ Lightning Shield

Call down the storm.
When you block an attack, there is a 50% chance a lightning bolt strikes your enemy, turning defense into divine punishment.
